archetype: Performance Pro with Luxury Data (High-contrast Dark + Gold)

global_rules.mobile_first_container: App container must be max-width: 480px, margin: 0 auto, min-height: 100vh, position: relative, overflow-x: hidden. Wrap the main content in this container.
global_rules.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-bot-button').
global_rules.bottom_padding: Main content must have padding-bottom to account for the fixed bottom navigation (e.g., pb-24).

primary_sans.usage: All headings, labels, buttons, and UI text.

secondary_mono.usage: CRITICAL: Used for ALL numbers including Prices, Balances, P&L, Dates, Times. Must always include 'tabular-nums' utility.

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-[14px] for main cards, rounded-full for buttons/badges.

header.layout: sticky top-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-[#0D1117]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#242E3D]
header.logo_mark: w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-[#E3B341]/10 border border-[#E3B341]/30 flex items-center justify-center text-[#E3B341] font-bold text-sm
header.status_badge: flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#151B24] border border-[#242E3D] text-xs font-medium
header.notification_dot: absolute top-1.5 right-1.5 w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-[#E0635E]

bottom_navigation.layout: fixed bottom-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full max-w-[480px] z-50 bg-[#151B24] border-t border-[#242E3D] px-2 py-2 flex items-center justify-between pb-safe
bottom_navigation.tab_item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 flex-1 rounded-xl transition-all

start_stop_button.button_base: relative w-32 h-32 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xl font-bold tracking-wider transition-all duration-300 transform active:scale-95
start_stop_button.glow_layer: absolute inset-0 rounded-full blur-xl opacity-50 transition-opacity

session_rail_24h.container: w-full h-12 bg-[#151B24] rounded-[14px] border border-[#242E3D] relative overflow-hidden flex
session_rail_24h.highlight_london: absolute top-0 bottom-0 left-[33%] w-[33%] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E3B341]/0 via-[#E3B341]/10 to-[#E3B341]/0 border-b-2 border-[#E3B341]/50
session_rail_24h.highlight_newyork: absolute top-0 bottom-0 left-[54%] w-[33%] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E3B341]/0 via-[#E3B341]/10 to-[#E3B341]/0 border-b-2 border-[#E3B341]
session_rail_24h.current_time_marker: absolute top-0 bottom-0 w-0.5 bg-[#E9ECF2] shadow-[0_0_8px_#E9ECF2] z-10

smc_chart.container: w-full h-[300px] bg-[#0D1117] rounded-[14px] border border-[#242E3D] overflow-hidden relative

drawings.sweeps: Circle marker, red (#E0635E) at wick extremes
drawings.bos_choch: Dotted line, green (#3FB68B) with text label

segmented_control.container: flex p-1 bg-[#0D1117] rounded-xl border border-[#242E3D]
segmented_control.item_base: flex-1 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-center rounded-lg transition-all

cards.base: bg-[#151B24] rounded-[14px] border border-[#242E3D] p-4 flex flex-col gap-2
cards.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#8A94A6]

signal_log.item: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 border-b border-[#242E3D] last:border-0
signal_log.icon_accepted: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#3FB68B]/10 text-[#3FB68B] flex items-center justify-center
signal_log.icon_rejected: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#E0635E]/10 text-[#E0635E] flex items-center justify-center
signal_log.icon_news: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#E3B341]/10 text-[#E3B341] flex items-center justify-center

forms_and_inputs.input: w-full bg-[#0D1117] border border-[#242E3D] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#E9ECF2] placeholder:text-[#8A94A6] focus:border-[#E3B341] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E3B341]/50 font-mono
forms_and_inputs.toggle: relative inline-flex h-6 w-11 items-center rounded-full transition-colors focus:outline-none data-[state=checked]:bg-[#3FB68B] data-[state=unchecked]:bg-[#242E3D]
forms_and_inputs.primary_button: w-full py-3.5 bg-[#E3B341] text-[#0D1117] font-bold rounded-xl text-center active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform

dashboard: Cards Grid (Solde, Equité, P&L Jour) - 2 cols
Open Positions List (BUY/SELL badge, P&L floating)
backtest: Results Cards (Winrate, Profit Factor, Drawdown, etc.)
settings: MetaApi Config (Password input for Token, AccountID)
Segmented Control: Démo / Réel (Réel requires lock icon)
Prop Firm Mode Section (Drawdown limits display)

icons: Use lucide-react. Standardize stroke-width to 2. Key icons: Bell, Play, Square (Stop), History, BarChart3, Settings, Lock, CheckCircle2, XCircle, AlertTriangle.
instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard semantic HTML div/section with standard Tailwind classes. Avoid overly wrapping things in heavy third-party UI libs unless needed (like Radix UI for exact accessibility on complex things).
CRITICAL: Restrict the app shell to max-w-[480px] centered on screen, simulating a mobile app on desktop.
CRITICAL: Apply 'font-mono' and 'tabular-nums' to EVERY SINGLE price, percentage, balance, and time display.
Implement the 24h rail using absolute positioning inside a relative container to place the London/NY highlights.
All copy must be in French as specified.
